projectProperties.additionalLegacyWorkspaces: Additional legacy workspace records exist on this project. Paperclip is using the primary workspace as the codebase view.
projectProperties.archiveHelp: Archive this project to hide it from the sidebar and project selectors.
projectProperties.clearLocalFolderConfirm: Clear local folder from this workspace?
projectProperties.codebaseHelp: Repo identifies the source of truth. Local folder is the default place agents write code.
projectProperties.envHint: Applied to all runs for issues in this project. Project values override agent env on key conflicts.
projectProperties.isolatedIssueCheckoutsHelp: Let issues choose between the project's primary checkout and an isolated execution workspace.
projectProperties.localFolderAbsolutePathError: Local folder must be a full absolute path.
projectProperties.name: Name
projectProperties.newIssuesDefaultIsolated: New issues default to isolated checkout
projectProperties.newIssuesDefaultIsolatedHelp: If disabled, new issues stay on the project's primary checkout unless someone opts in.
projectProperties.provisionTeardownHelp: Provision runs inside the derived worktree before agent execution. Teardown is stored here for future cleanup flows.
projectProperties.repoUrlError: Repo must use a valid GitHub or GitHub Enterprise repo URL.
projectProperties.selectCompanyToCreateSecrets: Select a company to create secrets
projectProperties.unarchiveHelp: Unarchive this project to restore it in the sidebar and project selectors.
